svg.text: Full Greeks: delta, gamma, theta, vega
13 PUT SIGNALS — Sell Puts on Weakness
Single signal = always LOW. You need convergence.

g.text: Volume Climax Up (3x vol, up day)

svg.text: Loss stop hit (2x monthlies, 1.5x weeklies) OR earnings before expiry ≤30 DTE
Deep OTM (|delta| < 0.10) → 80% | Moderate OTM → 50% | Near ATM (> 0.25) → 40%
Earnings approaching (with specific guidance by moneyness + P&L)
TV flipped bearish | Confirmed downtrend | IV collapsed
Thesis intact. TV consensus healthy. Trend confirmed.
Every action includes roll recommendations with risk metrics
Go further OTM when IV is elevated

g.text: Vega cap: 2% NLV per 1pt IV move

svg.text: Delta proximity score (30%) + Yield score (40%) + Technical level (30%)
Real chain data (E*Trade bid/ask/delta) when available
Estimated from ATM IV and distance when chain unavailable

g.text: ROLL: Buy back $320P → Sell $380P exp Jun 25 @ $4.20
GOOG -1x Oct $270P — Earnings in 15d. Deep OTM, safe to hold
Wash sale: 30 cal day block | LTCG: 365 day protection

svg.text: TARGET: 25-40% Annualized | Go-Live: WR ≥55%, HIGH WR ≥65%, Max DD <12%
Manual approval on everything → Auto-close month 3 → Auto-HIGH month 4 → Auto-HIGH+MED month 5+
